use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and pages
Destructive action buttons with warning styling
Secondary alternative actions with outline variants
Icon-only buttons for toolbar and navigation contexts
Ghost and link variants for inline text actions
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Provides accessible focus-visible states and disabled states out of the box.
